speaker: RICHARD
text: Now tell me, brother Clarence, what think you

speaker: RICHARD
text: Of this new marriage with the Lady Grey?

speaker: RICHARD
text: Hath not our brother made a worthy choice?

speaker: CLARENCE
text: Alas, you know ’tis far from hence to France.

speaker: CLARENCE
text: How could he stay till Warwick made return?

speaker: SOMERSET
text: My lords, forbear this talk. Here comes the King.

speaker: RICHARD
text: And his well-chosen bride.

speaker: CLARENCE
text: I mind to tell him plainly what I think.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Now, brother of Clarence, how like you our choice,

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: That you stand pensive, as half malcontent?

speaker: CLARENCE
text: As well as Lewis of France or the Earl of Warwick,

speaker: CLARENCE
text: Which are so weak of courage and in judgment

speaker: CLARENCE
text: That they’ll take no offense at our abuse.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Suppose they take offense without a cause,

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: They are but Lewis and Warwick; I am Edward,

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Your king and Warwick’s, and must have my will.

speaker: RICHARD
text: And shall have your will because our king.

speaker: RICHARD
text: Yet hasty marriage seldom proveth well.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Yea, brother Richard, are you offended too?

speaker: RICHARD
text: Not I.

speaker: RICHARD
text: No, God forbid that I should wish them severed

speaker: RICHARD
text: Whom God hath joined together. Ay, and ’twere pity

speaker: RICHARD
text: To sunder them that yoke so well together.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Setting your scorns and your mislike aside,

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Tell me some reason why the Lady Grey

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Should not become my wife and England’s queen?

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: And you too, Somerset and Montague,

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Speak freely what you think.

speaker: CLARENCE
text: Then this is mine opinion: that King Lewis

speaker: CLARENCE
text: Becomes your enemy for mocking him

speaker: CLARENCE
text: About the marriage of the Lady Bona.

speaker: RICHARD
text: And Warwick, doing what you gave in charge,

speaker: RICHARD
text: Is now dishonorèd by this new marriage.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: What if both Lewis and Warwick be appeased

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: By such invention as I can devise?

speaker: MONTAGUE
text: Yet to have joined with France in such alliance

speaker: MONTAGUE
text: Would more have strengthened this our commonwealth

speaker: MONTAGUE
text: ’Gainst foreign storms than any home-bred marriage.

speaker: HASTINGS
text: Why, knows not Montague that of itself

speaker: HASTINGS
text: England is safe, if true within itself?

speaker: MONTAGUE
text: But the safer when ’tis backed with France.

speaker: HASTINGS
text: ’Tis better using France than trusting France.

speaker: HASTINGS
text: Let us be backed with God and with the seas

speaker: HASTINGS
text: Which He hath giv’n for fence impregnable,

speaker: HASTINGS
text: And with their helps only defend ourselves.

speaker: HASTINGS
text: In them and in ourselves our safety lies.

speaker: CLARENCE
text: For this one speech, Lord Hastings well deserves

speaker: CLARENCE
text: To have the heir of the Lord Hungerford.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Ay, what of that? It was my will and grant,

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: And for this once my will shall stand for law.

speaker: RICHARD
text: And yet methinks your Grace hath not done well

speaker: RICHARD
text: To give the heir and daughter of Lord Scales

speaker: RICHARD
text: Unto the brother of your loving bride.

speaker: RICHARD
text: She better would have fitted me or Clarence;

speaker: RICHARD
text: But in your bride you bury brotherhood.

speaker: CLARENCE
text: Or else you would not have bestowed the heir

speaker: CLARENCE
text: Of the Lord Bonville on your new wife’s son,

speaker: CLARENCE
text: And leave your brothers to go speed elsewhere.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Alas, poor Clarence, is it for a wife

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: That thou art malcontent? I will provide thee.

speaker: CLARENCE
text: In choosing for yourself you showed your judgment,

speaker: CLARENCE
text: Which, being shallow, you shall give me leave

speaker: CLARENCE
text: To play the broker in mine own behalf.

speaker: CLARENCE
text: And to that end, I shortly mind to leave you.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Leave me or tarry, Edward will be king

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: And not be tied unto his brother’s will.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: My lords, before it pleased his Majesty

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: To raise my state to title of a queen,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: Do me but right and you must all confess

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: That I was not ignoble of descent,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: And meaner than myself have had like fortune.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: But as this title honors me and mine,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: So your dislikes, to whom I would be pleasing,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: Doth cloud my joys with danger and with sorrow.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: My love, forbear to fawn upon their frowns.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: What danger or what sorrow can befall thee

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: So long as Edward is thy constant friend

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: And their true sovereign, whom they must obey?

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Nay, whom they shall obey, and love thee too,

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Unless they seek for hatred at my hands;

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Which if they do, yet will I keep thee safe,

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: And they shall feel the vengeance of my wrath.

speaker: RICHARD
text: I hear, yet say not much, but think the more.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Now, messenger, what letters or what news from France?

speaker: POST
text: My sovereign liege, no letters and few words

speaker: POST
text: But such as I without your special pardon

speaker: POST
text: Dare not relate.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Go to, we pardon thee. Therefore, in brief,

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Tell me their words as near as thou canst guess them.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: What answer makes King Lewis unto our letters?

speaker: POST
text: At my depart, these were his very words:

speaker: POST
text: “Go tell false Edward, the supposèd king,

speaker: POST
text: That Lewis of France is sending over maskers

speaker: POST
text: To revel it with him and his new bride.”

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Is Lewis so brave? Belike he thinks me Henry.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: But what said Lady Bona to my marriage?

speaker: POST
text: These were her words, uttered with mild disdain:

speaker: POST
text: “Tell him, in hope he’ll prove a widower shortly,

speaker: POST
text: I’ll wear the willow garland for his sake.”

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: I blame not her; she could say little less;

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: She had the wrong. But what said Henry’s queen?

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: For I have heard that she was there in place.

speaker: POST
text: “Tell him,” quoth she, “my mourning weeds are done,

speaker: POST
text: And I am ready to put armor on.”

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Belike she minds to play the Amazon.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: But what said Warwick to these injuries?

speaker: POST
text: He, more incensed against your Majesty

speaker: POST
text: Than all the rest, discharged me with these words:

speaker: POST
text: “Tell him from me that he hath done me wrong,

speaker: POST
text: And therefore I’ll uncrown him ere ’t be long.”

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Ha! Durst the traitor breathe out so proud words?

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Well, I will arm me, being thus forewarned.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: They shall have wars and pay for their presumption.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: But say, is Warwick friends with Margaret?

speaker: POST
text: Ay, gracious sovereign, they are so linked in friendship

speaker: POST
text: That young Prince Edward marries Warwick’s daughter.

speaker: CLARENCE
text: Belike the elder; Clarence will have the younger.—

speaker: CLARENCE
text: Now, brother king, farewell, and sit you fast,

speaker: CLARENCE
text: For I will hence to Warwick’s other daughter,

speaker: CLARENCE
text: That, though I want a kingdom, yet in marriage

speaker: CLARENCE
text: I may not prove inferior to yourself.

speaker: CLARENCE
text: You that love me and Warwick, follow me.

speaker: RICHARD
text: Not I. My thoughts aim at a further matter:

speaker: RICHARD
text: I stay not for the love of Edward, but the crown.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Clarence and Somerset both gone to Warwick?

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Yet am I armed against the worst can happen,

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: And haste is needful in this desp’rate case.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Pembroke and Stafford, you in our behalf

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Go levy men and make prepare for war.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: They are already, or quickly will be, landed.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Myself in person will straight follow you.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: But ere I go, Hastings and Montague,

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Resolve my doubt: you twain, of all the rest,

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Are near to Warwick by blood and by alliance.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Tell me if you love Warwick more than me.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: If it be so, then both depart to him.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: I rather wish you foes than hollow friends.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: But if you mind to hold your true obedience,

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Give me assurance with some friendly vow,

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: That I may never have you in suspect.

speaker: MONTAGUE
text: So God help Montague as he proves true!

speaker: HASTINGS
text: And Hastings as he favors Edward’s cause!

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Now, brother Richard, will you stand by us?

speaker: RICHARD
text: Ay, in despite of all that shall withstand you.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Why, so. Then am I sure of victory.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Now therefore let us hence and lose no hour

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Till we meet Warwick with his foreign power.
